occupation: Councillor at Media, Advertising & Communications Charter (MAC)
headline: General Manager at OMC - Out of Home Measurement Council
summary:
Over 30 years of Marketing experience including several years in client servicing with Tradigital Consulting PTY LTD.   Media Strategist responsible for leading and executing national media campaigns for top tier clients such as  Sun International, MNet, Cell C, Absa and many smaller clients too. Excellent written and verbal skills, experienced in collaborating with all levels of an organization to deliver solid results. Strong leadership qualities, highly motivated and results-driven, adaptable, collaborative team player who works well under pressure on multiple tasks with tight deadlines or within a fast paced environment.

General Manager of the Out of Home Measurement Council delivering a media currency which contributes to building the credibility and stature of the OOH industry through inclusive and representative research,

Councillor on the MAC (Media, Advertising & Communications) Charter reporting into the presidency:  Sub committee:   Governance, Finance and Fund Raising
location_str: City of Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa

experiences.title: Councillor
experiences.description: Assisting in transforming the media, advertising and communications industry.

experiences.company: OMC - Out of Home Measurement Council
experiences.title: General Manager
Senior Media Strategist
experiences.description:
I have over 20 years experience in the media industry and have had the privilege to work on key blue chip clients during this time. I have worked on Absa, Nedbank, Scorpion Legal, Sun International, M-Net and DSTV, Cell C, Neotel, and most recently McDonalds to name but a few.

Having started my career as a Media Buyer, I have the full understanding of the media process and understand the importance of all facets of media.  

I have dedicated many hours to training both clients and students alike about media.   Sharing knowledge through training is my way of giving back to the industry and I ethos is that no question is a stupid question and we all learn something new every day!

I am available to do freelance media strategies and media audits, contract work and will also do detailed training sessions to clients, media folk (agency and media owners) and students.

ROI is the most dangerous KPI in marketing. Exactly! How can people just think that looking at budgets and spend reflects what the return actually is?
